subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Cedric at sea, 1912-03-28
subcodes.first_line: What hardship these coal miners have to suffer, how poor and needy they are!
subcodes.first_line_orig: این حمالهای زغال کشی چه قدر تحمل زحمت مینمایند چه قدر محتاج و فقیر ندخیلی لازمست صاحبان کمپانی
subcodes.subjects: @labor and management; labor relations; profit sharing, @wealth inequality and its moderation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
